title: Decouple live staged mock-spine proofs from fixture phrases
problem: Combined live proofs failed or misread as regressions when fetchable live artifacts lacked checksum-pinned mock fixture marker phrases.
acceptance_criteria: Layer 1 acquisition tests pass without fixture phrase coupling.
Layer 3 combined proofs skip with unsuitable_live_artifact when fetchable but incompatible.
Default CI unchanged; live_network tests remain env-gated.
non_goals: Changing mock fixture claim validation rules.
rollback_plan: Revert proof layer helpers; restore single combined live tests.
